barRaise.topFinding: Strong build cycle with the four cheap process fixes still deferred. Stage-1 of the 2D-to-3D migration landed and committed (v0.97.1 through v0.97.3), the boot flow is now 3D-only, and a verified 2D-drop manifest gives the parallel-roster cleanup a concrete path - real progress. But the dashboard writer (scripts/write-dashboard-status.ps1:99-106) still hardcodes the barRaise block to null on every release, so HBH.json.barRaise is all-null and every one of these reports is invisible to the dashboard - fourth consecutive cycle as the top action. The render-lane gap got sharper, not smaller: changelog v0.97.3 now declares the boot flow 3D-only with no live path to any 2D scene, while the GDD spec body (:1889/:4584/:5193) still names 2D as the render spec and says 2D boots alongside, so the GDD now contradicts itself. save_version is still absent across all of source/ while the menu Continue loads world3d_save.json directly. None of it is a code emergency; the deficit is entirely on minutes-of-work closing items.
